setup.cardDescription: Sync your data securely across all your devices.
setup.foundOtherDevices: Other connected devices were found on your account. Continue to connect this device.
setup.encryptedInfo: Your data is end-to-end encrypted. Only your devices can read it.

stale.keysNeedUpdatingDescription: Security settings changed on another device. Connect this device again to keep syncing.

orphaned.restoreTitle: Use This Device to Restore Sync
orphaned.restoreDescription: No other connected device is available. We'll restart sync using the data already on this device.
orphaned.confirmDescription: We'll restart sync using the data already on this device.

untrusted.notConnectedYet: This device is not connected yet
untrusted.enterCodeFromDevices_one: Enter the code from one of your {{count}} other connected device.
untrusted.enterCodeFromDevices_other: Enter the code from one of your {{count}} other connected devices.
untrusted.enterCodeGeneric: Enter the code from your other connected device to sync your data.
untrusted.connectToStartSyncing: Connect this device to start syncing.

waitingSnapshot.otherDeviceFinishing: Your other device is still finishing setup.
waitingSnapshot.trustedHint: You can speed things up now, or wait and we'll continue automatically in the background.
waitingSnapshot.untrustedHint: Please finish setup on your other connected device first. This page will update automatically.

bootstrap.hasDataDescription: To finish syncing, the data on this device will be replaced with data from your other device.
bootstrap.waitingOtherDeviceDescription: We'll finish syncing as soon as a fresh snapshot is available.
bootstrap.retryStartedDescription: Checking for an updated snapshot and applying pending sync changes.

snapshot.uploadedDescription: Newly connected devices can now finish syncing from this snapshot.

overwrite.replaceDataDescription: Your local data will be replaced with data from your other connected device.

reinit.title: Set up sync again from this device?
reinit.description: We'll keep the data on this device and use it to restart sync. Other connected devices may need to be connected again.

recovery.title: Set Up This Device Again
recovery.description: Sync was turned off for this device. Set it up again to keep your data up to date across your devices.

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect this device?
disconnectDialog.description: This will remove sync from this device. You can set it up again later.

unpairDialog.title: Unpair device?
unpairDialog.descriptionLast: This is your only connected device. You'll need to connect a device again to continue syncing your data.
unpairDialog.description: This will remove "{{name}}" from your account. The device will need to be connected again to sync data.

pairing.enterCodeDescription: Enter the code from your other connected device
pairing.scanOrEnterDescription: Scan or enter this code on your other device
pairing.gettingReadyDescription: This will only take a moment.
pairing.prepareFailed: We couldn't finish getting this device ready.
pairing.finishingSetupDescription: Preparing your data for the new device
pairing.syncingDataDescription: This may take a few seconds

waiting.confirmCodeMatches: Confirm this code matches on your other device
waiting.securelyConnecting: Please wait while we securely connect your device

errors.backupPlatformUnsupported: Backup before device sync is currently supported on desktop, web, and iOS only
